title: Luxury Yacht Linked to Russian Oligarch Passes Through Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: The Nord, a 464-foot vessel, appears to be tied to Aleksei A. Mordashov, a Russian steel mogul who is under American and European sanctions.
summary_public: The Nord, a 464-foot vessel, appears to be tied to Aleksei A. Mordashov, a Russian steel mogul who is under American and European sanctions.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian Oligarch Passes Through Strait of Hormuz...under European sanctions.
